message:
feat(fp-io): SqlWriteOptions::method for multi-row INSERT batching (br-i0ml / fd90.19)

Add SqlInsertMethod = Single (default) | Multi matching pandas
pd.to_sql(method=...). Single keeps current behavior (one INSERT per
row, prepared statement reused under transaction). Multi builds a
single INSERT INTO t VALUES (...), (...), ... statement per chunk,
chunked by conn.max_param_count() / num_cols when set, or whole-frame
when the backend reports no max.

- SqlInsertMethod enum with Default = Single
- SqlWriteOptions::method field
- sql_multi_row_insert_query_in_schema helper (ordinals 1..=rows*cols)
- write_sql_with_options branches on options.method
- 12 existing struct literals updated with method: Single
- 7 new tests: round-trip parity Single vs Multi, placeholder count,
  zero-row rejection, chunk boundary at max_param_count, unbounded
  single-statement path, NaT/Null preservation, default-is-Single

285 fp-io tests pass; clippy -D warnings clean; ubs Critical=0.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
